caption.full:
Rose Byrne and Jenna Ortega to star in gymnastics drama 'Nasty'

Rose Byrne and Jenna Ortega will reunite with director Mary Bronstein for the new film 'Nasty'. The project follows a young woman battling for a spot on the Olympic gymnastics team. Margot Robbie's LuckyChap banner is producing the film.

Send this to your gymnastics-loving friend!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #NastyMovie #JennaOrtega
caption.firstComment: So thrilled to see Rose and Jenna reunite with Mary Bronstein — this team has such a strong creative chemistry, and I’m already rooting for this Olympic gymnastics drama!
